extracted.title: Notice to All ANR Wisconsin Area (Zone 7) Shippers and Producers
extracted.description:
Notice to All ANR Wisconsin Area (Zone 7) Shippers and Producers, Effective 11/1/25 – 3/31/26

ANR continues to evaluate Wisconsin Winter Operations and Constraint Areas to both protect system integrity and provide customer flexibility.

Based on operational conditions and market demands, ANR is providing the following update regarding the Operational Capacity of the Milwaukee Lateral Constraint Group.

The Operational Capacity of the Milwaukee Lateral (Location 505621) will be controlled to 459,051 Dth when the total nominations for Wisconsin (Location 261194)/Sandwich Northbound (Location FPSNDWNB) are at or above approx. 83% of the Operational Capacity of 2,443,716 Dth - approx. 2,028,284 Dth.

The Operational Capacity of the Milwaukee Lateral (Location 505621) will be controlled to 500,000 Dth when the total nominations for Wisconsin (Location 261194)/Sandwich Northbound (Location FPSNDWNB) are below approx. 83% of the Operational Capacity of 2,443,716 Dth - approx. 2,028,284 Dth.

ANR will implement these changes effective for gas day 11/1/2025 and will continue to evaluate operating conditions and market demands. This information is subject to change and will be updated as needed.

Please direct any questions to your Account Coordinator, Customer Service Representative, or the Nominations and Scheduling hotline @ 800-827-5267
